texto: Are you by any chance acquainted with the words 'steel toe'? Or do the words 'permanent dent' mean anything to you?"My locker door is not intimidated. "My grandfather was a vault at Fort Knox, and if you try to dent me with a kick you will only tear some ligament that will never mend.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de David Klass que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Are you by any chance acquainted with the words 'steel toe'? Or do the words 'permanent dent' mea…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, humorous, words, com foco em termino e reflexao.
